title: Assistant Superintendent K-6
notes: Largest district in batch (~10k students). Mainwaring replaced Ruth Uecker in 2022; oversees K-6 elementary including PreK programs. Email format inferred from district pattern (first_last@gfps.k12.mt.us). Confirmed via The Electric / Yahoo Finance news articles.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Butte SD No. 1 K-12 district. Curriculum Dept at 119 N Montana St. Email inferred from district @bsd1.org domain pattern.

title: Assistant Superintendent
notes: Helena Public Schools — combined K-12 district (~7,600 students). McKay serves as Asst Superintendent under Rex Weltz; presents on boundary, curriculum work. PEAK and Early Learning runs Special Ed preschool (admin Erin Maxwell moved to HMS asst principal); Lona Carter is Special Ed/Student Services Director. McKay is best district-level decision-maker for elementary/curriculum at this scale.

title: Superintendent
notes: Chad Johnson is current superintendent — previously at Hardin. 129 River Drive, Livingston, MT 59047. Email inferred from district pattern.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Curriculum, Instruction & Assessment department. Superintendent is Dr. Linda Filpula. District K-12 reviews curricula every 5 years per MT accreditation.

title: Curriculum Director (incoming Superintendent 7/1/2026)
notes: 13 years as Curriculum Director. Replacing outgoing Supt Brent Sukut effective July 1, 2026. District uses www.sidneyps.com (not the old schoolwires URL). Email inferred from district pattern.

title: Curriculum Director
notes: Curriculum and Instruction department. District uses Discovery Education for digital learning. Polson is a Flathead Reservation district.

title: Superintendent
notes: Fort Peck Tribes (Assiniboine & Sioux) reservation district. Head Start partnerships in Wolf Point, Poplar, Frazer, Fort Kipp. K-12 ~700 students. Email inferred from district pattern.

title: Superintendent (retiring end of 2025-26)
notes: Uthlaut retiring end of 2025-26 school year — new supt for 2026-27 not yet named. Elementary principal Steve Fanning could be a secondary contact for ECE. Gallatin County district. Email inferred from district pattern.

notes: Sandra Beal — 6th year as Curriculum Director; selected as new Superintendent Nov 2025, takes role July 2026 replacing Mark Johnston. Best ECE contact regardless of role change. Flathead Reservation district. Email inferred from district pattern.

notes: Melville Elementary is an ultra-rural K-8 (~20 students) in Sweet Grass County. No public dedicated district staff director.

title: Supervising Teacher (sole administrator)
notes: Jackson Elementary School District — one-room rural school in Big Hole Valley, Beaverhead County. PreK-8, supervising teacher serves as on-site admin. County Superintendent of Schools (Beaverhead Co.) provides admin services across 9 districts. No district website. Best contact is Huxtable directly at the school, or county supt office at 406-683-2724.
